svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="HighLevelArchitecture" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="-654" dy="-207" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1500" pageHeight="950" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=20;fontStyle=1;align=left;" value="Pede Aqui — High-Level Architecture" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="600" x="60" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="clients" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;" value="Client Applications" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="140" width="1140" x="60" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cweb" parent="clients" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Customer Web SPA
React 18 + Vite
(pede-aqui-delivery)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="240" x="30" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="backoffice" parent="clients" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Backoffice
Next.js 15
(pede-aqui-backoffice)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="240" x="300" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="capp" parent="clients" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Customer App
Flutter
(pede_aqui_delivery_app)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="240" x="570" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="courierapp" parent="clients" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="Courier App
Flutter
(pede_aqui_courier_app)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="240" x="840" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="backend" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=13;" value="Backend — Spring Boot REST API (com.delivery, /api/v1)
Layered: controller → service → repository → entity · JWT resource server · TenantContext" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="900" x="60" y="330" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="keycloak" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontStyle=1;" value="Keycloak
Identity Provider
(realm: delivery)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="190" x="1010" y="330" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="infra" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;" value="Infrastructure (Docker Compose)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="160" width="1140" x="60" y="560" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pg" parent="infra" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="PostgreSQL + PostGIS
(Flyway migrations)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="200" x="40" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="redis" parent="infra" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" value="Redis
(cache)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="180" x="300" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="minio" parent="infra" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="MinIO / AWS S3
(object storage)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="200" x="540" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="prom" parent="infra" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="Prometheus
(metrics)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="180" x="800" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ec1" edge="1" parent="1" source="clients" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="backend" value="HTTPS / REST + Bearer JWT"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ec2" edge="1" parent="1" source="clients" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;dashed=1;" target="keycloak" value="ROPC / PKCE login"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ec3" edge="1" parent="1" source="backend" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;" target="keycloak" value="Validate JWK"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ec4" edge="1" parent="1" source="backend" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;exitX=0.25;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" target="pg" value="JPA / SQL"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ec5" edge="1" parent="1" source="backend" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;exitX=0.45;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" target="redis" value="cache"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ec6" edge="1" parent="1" source="backend" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;exitX=0.6;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" target="minio" value="presigned URL"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ec7" edge="1" parent="1" source="backend" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;dashed=1;exitX=0.75;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" target="prom" value="scrape /actuator"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ec8" edge="1" parent="1" source="clients" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=11;dashed=1;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" target="minio" value="Browser → S3 direct PUT (presigned)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
